vlm_text: The image shows a cylindrical metal container with a red and white label. The top half of the label is red and the bottom half is white. Text on the label reads 'Campbell's' and 'Tomato Soup'. The can appears to be sitting on a wooden surface.
check_image_description: A red and white Campbell's condensed tomato soup can, label clearly legible, front view on a wood table.
notes: Draft caption, pending real VLM capture. Classic clear-can reference.

vlm_text: The image shows a can with a green and white label. Text on the label reads 'Del Monte' and 'Whole Kernel Corn'. There is an image of yellow corn kernels on the lower portion of the label. The container is cylindrical.
check_image_description: A Del Monte whole kernel corn can, green label with a photo of corn, label facing camera.

vlm_text: A tall slender cylindrical can with a predominantly white background and pink and yellow geometric patterns. The word 'LaCroix' is printed in large letters and 'Pamplemousse' appears below it. The can appears to be a beverage container.
check_image_description: A LaCroix pamplemousse (grapefruit) sparkling water can, white with pink and yellow pattern, upright on counter.
notes: Draft caption, pending real VLM capture. Beverage can, slim profile.

vlm_text: The image shows a man holding a can of 'Can of Corn' in his left hand. He's wearing a black baseball cap and glasses. The can is yellow with black text, indicating it's a corn-based product. In the background, there's a large flat-screen TV.
check_image_description: A cylindrical scented candle wrapped in a yellow label that reads 'CAN OF CORN' in large black letters. The top of the candle shows wax and a wick, not a pull-tab or metal rim. Held by a person in a black cap and glasses.

classical_decision.label: CAN OF CORN
classical_decision._note: Pre-filled per design statement, not a real run. The classical arm is built to false-positive here; see classical.README.md 'Known failure modes'. Replace with a real analyzeFrame() output once a real photo is captured.

notes: Real live-smoke-test caption, 2026-04-22. The hero adversarial sample. Jonas held up a Trader Joe's Corn Scented Candle; Claude correctly refused with reasoning about scented candle vs food. Ground truth: NOT a can.

vlm_text: A tall cylindrical container with a blue and red label. A cartoon figure of a man with white hair and a smiling face is visible on the front. Text on the label reads 'Quaker' and 'Old Fashioned Oats'. The container appears to be made of cardboard.
check_image_description: A Quaker Oats cardboard canister, cylindrical, blue and red label. Not a metal can — walls are visibly cardboard and the top is a plastic lid, not a metal rim.
notes: Draft caption, pending real VLM capture. Cardboard cylinder, same shape but wrong material.

vlm_text: The image shows a cylindrical container with a red label. The word 'Coca-Cola' is written in white script across the label. The container has a narrow neck at the top with a black plastic cap. The body appears to be transparent plastic with a dark liquid inside.
check_image_description: A 20oz plastic Coca-Cola bottle. Narrow threaded neck with a black screw cap, visibly a bottle, not a can.
notes: Draft caption, pending real VLM capture. Bottle, not can — tests shape discrimination.

vlm_text: The image shows a person's hand holding a cylindrical can. Most of the label is hidden behind the fingers. A small strip of red and white is visible near the top of the can and a silver rim is visible along the bottom edge.
check_image_description: A hand gripping a can, most of the body occluded. Visible: a silver top rim and a sliver of red/white label near the top; brand text not legible.
notes: Draft caption, pending real VLM capture. Tests capture-with-partial-info.

vlm_text: The image shows a cylindrical metallic container. A bright reflection covers most of the front of the can, washing out any label text. Some blue color is faintly visible behind the glare. The shape is clearly a can.
check_image_description: A can under a ceiling light with a hot glare band across its front; the label underneath appears blue but text is unreadable.
notes: Draft caption, pending real VLM capture. Tests glare-mitigation path.
